channel.title: ellysplate TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from ellysplate

item.title: a big fat vegan pot luck!! 🥰🥰 #potluck #partyfood #veganuary
item.description: a big fat vegan pot luck!! 🥰🥰 #potluck #partyfood #veganuary

item.title: Day 18/31 of helping you go vegan-ish in 2026, everyone needs those easy one pan meals to fall back on when life gets in the way ❤️ Serves 3 2 red onions 1 red pepper 1 tbsp chipotle paste 2 tsp paprika 1 tsp cumin 1 large tin chickpeas 1 tin crushe
item.description: Day 18/31 of helping you go vegan-ish in 2026, everyone needs those easy one pan meals to fall back on when life gets in the way ❤️ Serves 3 2 red onions 1 red pepper 1 tbsp chipotle paste 2 tsp paprika 1 tsp cumin 1 large tin chickpeas 1 tin crushe

item.title: day 19/31 of defying alllllll the vegan misconceptions 🙂‍↕️ #veganuary #budgetrecipe #veganrecipes
item.description: day 19/31 of defying alllllll the vegan misconceptions 🙂‍↕️ #veganuary #budgetrecipe #veganrecipes

item.title: Day 20/31 of helping you go vegan-ish in 2026, this is your perfect egg replacement for brekkie with even more protein 🕺🏼 Ingredients (makes 2) 260g of firm tofu (reserve 60g) 240g silken tofu 100ml soya milk 2 tbsp nutritional yeast 2 tbsp gram flour 1
item.description: Day 20/31 of helping you go vegan-ish in 2026, this is your perfect egg replacement for brekkie with even more protein 🕺🏼 Ingredients (makes 2) 260g of firm tofu (reserve 60g) 240g silken tofu 100ml soya milk 2 tbsp nutritional yeast 2 tbsp gram flour 1

item.title: Day 21/31… put the ones in the store DOWN, this is vegan cheese that tastes 10/10!! 🙂‍↕️ For the ‘ricotta’ 120g flaked almonds 300g medium-firm tofu, drained ½-1 lemon, juiced 1 garlic clove 5 tbsp nutritional yeast 2 tsp apple cider vinegar 1 tsp white
item.description: Day 21/31… put the ones in the store DOWN, this is vegan cheese that tastes 10/10!! 🙂‍↕️ For the ‘ricotta’ 120g flaked almonds 300g medium-firm tofu, drained ½-1 lemon, juiced 1 garlic clove 5 tbsp nutritional yeast 2 tsp apple cider vinegar 1 tsp white

item.title: Day 26/31 of helping you go vegan-ish in 2026, you’ll never have to think about what to make for lunch again 🏃‍♀️ less than 10 ingredients and just 10 mins, protein packed AND preppable, what more could you want ⭐️ Makes enough for 4 bagels 400g chickpea

item.title: Day 30/31 of helping you go vegan-ish in 2026… this is how easy it is to get nearly 130g protein in (ad over on the other app but wanted to share here too ❤️) Fave protein boosters: ⭐️ adding a 70g tofu portion into things like toasties boosts protein by

item.title: do i just have to take the worlds biggest L or can anyone help me xxx
item.description: do i just have to take the worlds biggest L or can anyone help me xxx

item.title: Welcome to my new series, OG vegan 🥰🥰🥰 expect easy nostalgic classics with minimal alternatives used, perfect for my OG vegans or for those just trying to eat more plants! Lmk what other classics you wanna see me recreate!! 💋 Serves 4-5 1 carrot (90g) 1
item.description: Welcome to my new series, OG vegan 🥰🥰🥰 expect easy nostalgic classics with minimal alternatives used, perfect for my OG vegans or for those just trying to eat more plants! Lmk what other classics you wanna see me recreate!! 💋 Serves 4-5 1 carrot (90g) 1

item.title: Marmite on toast cookies… because like the rest of the internet I have been DREAMING about @Lungi’s always baking creation and had to recreate (& veganise) for the savoury girls! Makes approx 8 cookies 150g plain flour 3 tbsp cornstarch 1 ½ tsp baking
item.description: Marmite on toast cookies… because like the rest of the internet I have been DREAMING about @Lungi’s always baking creation and had to recreate (& veganise) for the savoury girls! Makes approx 8 cookies 150g plain flour  3 tbsp cornstarch 1 ½ tsp baking

item.title: Episode 2 of OG vegan… it doesn’t get more nostalgic than this chickpea ‘tuna’ 🐟 Forgot how much I loved this?? The perfect sandwich meal prep, packed w punchy flavours and keeps in the fridge for 5 days! Love this with pasta, in a toastie or on a jacket
item.description: Episode 2 of OG vegan… it doesn’t get more nostalgic than this chickpea ‘tuna’ 🐟 Forgot how much I loved this?? The perfect sandwich meal prep, packed w punchy flavours and keeps in the fridge for 5 days! Love this with pasta, in a toastie or on a jacket

item.title: It’s been a minute since I’ve made a jaw breaking burger 😄😄😄 episode 3 of OG vegan HAD to be a classic veggie patty… more fibre, more goodness & more satisfying than grabbing them off the shelves!! Makes 8 smash patties (serves 4) 400g black beans (drain
item.description: It’s been a minute since I’ve made a jaw breaking burger 😄😄😄 episode 3 of OG vegan HAD to be a classic veggie patty… more fibre, more goodness & more satisfying than grabbing them off the shelves!! Makes 8 smash patties (serves 4) 400g black beans (drain

item.title: Does buying second hand leather mean i still exploit animals? For me, my goal is not just reducing animal exploitation reducing my impact on the planet. Fast fashion is the second-biggest consumer of water and is responsible for about 10% of global carbon
item.description: Does buying second hand leather mean i still exploit animals? For me, my goal is not just reducing animal exploitation reducing my impact on the planet. Fast fashion is the second-biggest consumer of water and is responsible for about 10% of global carbon

item.title: The OG veggie meatball 😌😌😌 move over meat alts, tofu is THAT GIRL!! Makes 12-15 balls 300g firm tofu, drained and water removed 1 tbsp chia seeds + 2 tbsp water 3 spring onions, chopped 2 tbsp red curry paste 1.5 inch ginger, grated 2 cloves garlic,
item.description: The OG veggie meatball 😌😌😌 move over meat alts, tofu is THAT GIRL!! Makes 12-15 balls 300g firm tofu, drained and water removed 1 tbsp chia seeds + 2 tbsp water 3 spring onions, chopped 2 tbsp red curry paste 1.5 inch ginger, grated 2 cloves garlic,

item.title: My faaaaave speedy vegan recipes 🪄🪄🪄
item.description: My faaaaave speedy vegan recipes 🪄🪄🪄

item.title: Super green eggless breakfast cups 💚 the perfect spring twist on one of my fave grab and go breakfasts, gluten free & vegan with over 7g protein per cup! Makes 15 cups 1 block of silken tofu 200g frozen spinach 1 pack fresh basil (a handful) 600g firm to
item.description: Super green eggless breakfast cups 💚 the perfect spring twist on one of my fave grab and go breakfasts, gluten free & vegan with over 7g protein per cup! Makes 15 cups 1 block of silken tofu 200g frozen spinach 1 pack fresh basil (a handful) 600g firm to

item.title: Deli slices… out of tofu?!? Welcome back to OG Vegan, this tofu ‘bacon’ is a certified classic. Meal preppable, and one small tweak to make gluten free 😌 Makes 3 ‘BLT’s For the bacon 1 block extra firm tofu 3 tbsp tamari 2 tbsp maple syrup 1 tbsp balsami
item.description: Deli slices… out of tofu?!? Welcome back to OG Vegan, this tofu ‘bacon’ is a certified classic. Meal preppable, and one small tweak to make gluten free 😌 Makes 3 ‘BLT’s For the bacon 1 block extra firm tofu 3 tbsp tamari 2 tbsp maple syrup 1 tbsp balsami

item.title: I’m glad staying single at uni didn’t work out lollllll

item.title: Caesar salad girlies RISE UP!!! my new miniseries is coming just in time for the weather heating up🤩 I've got three variations of my caesar sauce throughout the week to suit every dietary requirement (all vegan & gluten free as standard😌😌😌) so you can mi

item.title: XXL caesar wraps… I could eat these every single day 🙂‍↕️🙂‍↕️ welcome to episode 1/6 of my Caesar szn mini series, this one is perfect to pack for your picnics or for a speedy 15 minute wfh lunch 💋 Serves 1 1 large tortilla wrap (can sub for a GF alterna

item.title: Caesar carbonara?!? One for the 15 minutes dinner girlies, I could DRINK this sauce 🙂‍↕️🙂‍↕️ Serves 2 75g raw cashews, soaked 2 tbsp nutritional yeast 1 tsp Dijon mustard 1 garlic clove, grated 1 lemon, juiced 1 tbsp gherkins/cornichons 1 tbsp capers 1
item.description: Caesar carbonara?!? One for the 15 minutes dinner girlies, I could DRINK this sauce 🙂‍↕️🙂‍↕️ Serves 2 75g raw cashews, soaked 2 tbsp nutritional yeast 1 tsp Dijon mustard 1 garlic clove, grated 1 lemon, juiced 1 tbsp gherkins/cornichons 1 tbsp capers 1

item.title: Crispy tofu bacon caesar burgers 😛 episode 3 of caesar szn is a personal fave, the perfect burg to have on a sunny weeknight when you’re still craving something light n fresh 🫦 Makes 2 burgers 225g tofu 50g breadcrumbs of choice 1 tsp dried mixed herbs
item.description: Crispy tofu bacon caesar burgers 😛 episode 3 of caesar szn is a personal fave, the perfect burg to have on a sunny weeknight when you’re still craving something light n fresh 🫦 Makes 2 burgers 225g tofu 50g breadcrumbs of choice 1 tsp dried mixed herbs

item.title: Budget pasta sauces, to make your pennies & cupboard essentials go a lil further at the end of the month 🌟 🍋 Lemon butter bean sauce 1 tin butter beans 1 lemon (half zest, whole juiced) 1 tbsp olive oil 1 tsp miso paste 1 clove garlic 2 tbsp nutrition
item.description: Budget pasta sauces, to make your pennies & cupboard essentials go a lil further at the end of the month 🌟 🍋 Lemon butter bean sauce 1 tin butter beans 1 lemon (half zest, whole juiced) 1 tbsp olive oil 1 tsp miso paste 1 clove garlic 2 tbsp nutrition

item.title: CRISPY SATAY STYLE TOFU BURGER 🍔 i can’t believe it’s taken me this long to bring you a banging burg, i eat them so often it’s rare i wanna get home and make one too - this is the exception to the rule! the combination of the satay style dredge with the
item.description: CRISPY SATAY STYLE TOFU BURGER 🍔 i can’t believe it’s taken me this long to bring you a banging burg, i eat them so often it’s rare i wanna get home and make one too - this is the exception to the rule! the combination of the satay style dredge with the

item.title: SHAKE SHACK MUSHROOM BURGER 🍔 made vegan! Back with ep 5 of Banging Burgers and truly I am SHOOK that I enjoyed a mushroom burger so much?! I kept this recipe simple as the original looked classic and the flavours really popped (just look at that cheese
item.description: SHAKE SHACK MUSHROOM BURGER 🍔 made vegan! Back with ep 5 of Banging Burgers and truly I am SHOOK that I enjoyed a mushroom burger so much?! I kept this recipe simple as the original looked classic and the flavours really popped (just look at that cheese

item.title: creamy coconut noodles w/ umami shredded tofu mince 🍜 this one’s perfect if you’re short on time (& effort) but still want a soupy delicious hug in a bowl that tastes like it’s been simmering for hours, and idk why it look me so long to grate my tofu but
item.description: creamy coconut noodles w/ umami shredded tofu mince 🍜 this one’s perfect if you’re short on time (& effort) but still want a soupy delicious hug in a bowl that tastes like it’s been simmering for hours, and idk why it look me so long to grate my tofu but
